files.name: yolo-card-nano.onnx
files.purpose: Card detection overlay — true YOLOv8n nano (12.3 MB, opset 12), retrained + exported by Ayşenur 2026-05-29. Replaces the 50 MB YOLOv8m mislabeled as nano. Identical I/O contract: input images[1,3,640,640] f32 NCHW [0,1], output output0[1,9,8400] (4 bbox + 5 classes), same class order as labels.json.

files.name: silero-vad.onnx
files.purpose: Voice activity detection — skip upload on silent captures. Canonical release from github.com/snakers4/silero-vad.

files.name: facenet512-1ad91552.fp16.onnx
files.purpose: Client-side face embedding (Facenet512 FP16, opset 17). Exported from our pinned facenet512_weights.h5. INT8 rejected (onnxruntime-web WASM lacks ConvInteger). I/O: input[1,160,160,3] f32 BGR [0,1] aspect-preserve+pad; output 512-d, L2-normalized client-side.
